## Summary

<!-- Briefly describe what this PR does and why. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Feature (`feat`)
- [ ] Bug fix (`fix`)
- [ ] Documentation (`docs`)
- [ ] CI / build (`ci` / `build`)
- [ ] Infrastructure / IaC (`chore` / `feat` with scope)

## GitFlow alignment

- [ ] Target branch is correct (`develop` for features, `main` only for hotfix/release merges as per process)
- [ ] Branch name follows convention (`feature/`, `release/`, or `hotfix/`)

## Checklist

- [ ] Conventional Commits used for commit messages
- [ ] No hardcoded secrets or credentials (env vars / `${VAR_NAME}` placeholders only)
- [ ] Tests added or updated where applicable
- [ ] `docker compose` still runs locally if app code changed
- [ ] Terraform/Kubernetes changes documented in PR body (migration notes, new variables)

## Testing

<!-- How did you verify this change? Commands, screenshots, or links to CI. -->
